summary: The game announces a massive update including 3rd class advancements, castle siege renewal, and a new Pet Colosseum. Amidst this, the protagonist, Hyunwoo, struggles with a difficult quest to find the cause of a monster wave at Latus Fortress. After discovering and defeating a mysterious Weapon Ogre imbued with black magic, he reports his findings to Ferard and Lebron, revealing a deeper conspiracy threatening the Imperial throne.
key_moments: The game company announces a major update featuring class advancements, siege mode improvements, and the Pet Colosseum.
Hyunwoo tracks down and defeats a powerful, black-magic-imbued Weapon Ogre that serves as a clue to the monster wave quest.
Hyunwoo reports his findings to Ferard and Lebron, uncovering a conspiracy that forces them to seek an urgent audience with the Emperor.
